global_forbidden_claims: Inventing inventory availability not present in the input.
Inventing purchase cost when purchase_cost_estimate is null or unit_price is absent.
Inventing profit, margin, or more-profitable claims when profit data is missing.
Changing ship_today_count, shortage_g, risk_level, or expected_result from deterministic_result.
Treating next-day material arrival as same-day shippable.
Selecting a SKU with high confidence when the order text is ambiguous.
Generating priority order ranking when deterministic_result is absent.
Automatically deleting, merging, or editing orders without user confirmation.
Using older conversational context over deterministic_result when they conflict.

hard_fail_patterns.name: ship_today_count_overwrite
hard_fail_patterns.description: Model output changes the rule engine ship_today_count.

hard_fail_patterns.name: material_arrival_overwrite
hard_fail_patterns.description: Model says next_day material can affect today's shipment.

hard_fail_patterns.name: sku_ambiguity_overconfidence
hard_fail_patterns.description: Model marks ambiguous SKU match as high confidence without confirmation.

hard_fail_patterns.name: negative_inventory_continues
hard_fail_patterns.description: Model continues planning with negative inventory instead of validation_error.
